base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_sprites — a character (boss) from 1990 super mario world. Overworld Mario/Yoshi + stage-complete-flag + Koopaling-moving-tokens. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
